'''dhashadha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:leaderfag|leaderfag]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-sh-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:leaderfag|leaderfag]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| dhashadha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhæshædhæth|dhæshædhæth]] || [[word:dhæshædhæj|dhæshædhæj]] || [[word:dhæshædhæsh|dhæshædhæsh]] || [[word:dhæshædhæ|dhæshædhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhashashadhath|dhashashadhath]] || [[word:dhashashadhaj|dhashashadhaj]] || [[word:dhashashadhash|dhashashadhash]] || [[word:dhashashadha|dhashashadha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhashadhath|dhashadhath]] || [[word:dhashadhaj|dhashadhaj]] || [[word:dhashadhash|dhashadhash]] || [[word:dhashadha|dhashadha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhashafdhath|dhashafdhath]] || [[word:dhashafdhaj|dhashafdhaj]] || [[word:dhashafdhash|dhashafdhash]] || [[word:dhashafdhaf|dhashafdhaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhashadhatha|dhashadhatha]] || [[word:dhashadhaja|dhashadhaja]] || [[word:dhashadhasha|dhashadhasha]] || [[word:dhashadhaka|dhashadhaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhashadhath|dhashadhath]] || [[word:dhashadhaj|dhashadhaj]] || [[word:dhashadhash|dhashadhash]] || [[word:dhashadha|dhashadha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhashadhathal|dhashadhathal]] || [[word:dhashadhajal|dhashadhajal]] || [[word:dhashadhashal|dhashadhashal]] || [[word:dhashadhakal|dhashadhakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhashadhathatha|dhashadhathatha]] || [[word:dhashadhajaja|dhashadhajaja]] || [[word:dhashadhashasha|dhashadhashasha]] || [[word:dhashadhaka|dhashadhaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhashadhathan|dhashadhathan]] || [[word:dhashadhajan|dhashadhajan]] || [[word:dhashadhashan|dhashadhashan]] || [[word:dhashadhakan|dhashadhakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhashadhathaoro|dhashadhathaoro]] || [[word:dhashadhajaoro|dhashadhajaoro]] || [[word:dhashadhashaoro|dhashadhashaoro]] || [[word:dhashadhakaoro|dhashadhakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|06f9dc6}}
